---
title: "Welcome to my Personal Website"
image: images/headshot_2026.jpg
title-block-banner: "#FF5F05"
about:
  template: trestles 
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 23em
  links:
    - icon: book
      text: My R Textbook
      href: https://shaonl.github.io/Rbook
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/shaonlahiri/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:lahiri2@illinois.edu
    - icon: building
      text: Faculty Page
      href: https://publish.illinois.edu/hkfocusareas/lahiri-shaon/
    - icon: mortarboard-fill
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=K44Uu4MAAAAJ&hl=en
    - icon: database
      text: Open Science Framework
      href: https://osf.io/wv7rg/
    - icon: person-badge
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-9797-9566
---

## Hello There!

My name is Shaon (it rhymes with 'brown') Lahiri, and thanks for checking out my personal website.

Here is a quick summary of my current appointments and qualifications.

## Current Appointments

[**Assistant Professor of Public Health**]{style="background-color:#FF5F05; color:white; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 4px;"} - Department of Health and Kinesiology, College of Applied Health Sciences, University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign, Urbana, IL, USA.

**Associate Editor** - [*Nicotine & Tobacco Research*](https://academic.oup.com/ntr), Oxford Academic.

**Junior Co-Chair -** Theories and Techniques of Behavior Change Interventions Special Interest Group, Society of Behavioral Medicine.

**Research Affiliate** - Center for Global Health, Perelman School of Medicine (2026 - present) \| University of Pennsylvania, Philadelphia, PA, USA.

**Catalyst** - Berkeley Initiative for Transparency in the Social Sciences (2021 - present) \| University of California - Berkeley, Berkeley, CA, USA.

## Education

**Ph.D. in Social & Behavioral Sciences in Public Health** (2022) \| The George Washington University, Washington, DC, USA.

**Master of Public Health** (2014) \| Imperial College London, London, UK.

**B.A. in Psychology** (2012) \| University of Michigan - Ann Arbor, MI, USA.
